name: Magadan Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the sky and the seas of the Sea of Okhotsk
gold and the wealth of the region
courage and the labour of the people

description: A blue field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Magadan Oblast, depicting a stag standing above stylised mountains, sea waves and gold ingots.
history: Adopted in 2001 by the Magadan Oblast Duma; the design places the regional coat of arms on a plain blue field.

features.symbolism: the sky and the surrounding seas of the Russian Far East.

features.role: coat of arms of Magadan Oblast
features.symbolism: an escutcheon featuring a deer atop a stylised landscape of mountains, sea waves and gold ingots, recalling the oblast's reindeer herding, maritime fisheries and gold-mining industries.
